title: Sensitivity and specificity test of toehold
steps: Sterilize the bench, and put on a labmat

Thaw the reagents including 1. DNase/ RNase free water (store in -20°C) 2. solution A (store in -80°C) 3. solution B (store in -80°C) 4. RNase inhibitor (store in -20°C) 5.toehold switches with invertase DNA (store in 4°C) 6.miRNA as the trigger (store in 4°C) On ice
Gently shake and spin down the tube before adding (especially solution A and DNA plasmid)

Add below reagents in to PCR tubes in order: 1. ddH2O(till totally 5 µL ) 2. solution A 2 µL 3. solution B 1.5 µL 4. inhibitor 0.2 µL 5. toehold switches with invertase DNA 50 ng 6. miRNA 50 ng or 0 ng (depends on whether its control group or test group)
Place the PCR tubes in the dry bath incubator 37 °C 02:00:00
Put the PCR tubes On ice after 2 hours
Measure the glucose concentrations of each PCR tubes by glucometer
Put the PCR tubes in the dry bath incubator 55 °C 00:30:00
Measure the glucose concentrations of each PCR tubes by glucometer again
creator: Hung Liang Pai
